eas_text: A civil authority has issued A BLUE ALERT for the following counties or areas: Minnesota; at 11:07 AM on AUG 15, 2019 Effective until 11:22 AM. Message from MN BCA.
extra_text: This is a test of the Blue Alert System for the State of Minnesota. If there had been an actual emergency further instructions would have followed. This is only a test. No action is required. Stay tuned for further instructions.
